channel.title: Code Coverage on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Code Coverage on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub code coverage merge protection for pull requests
item.description:
GitHub added branch ruleset support to block pull request merges when code coverage falls below a threshold you configure. You can set coverage-based merge requirements to enforce a minimum percentage and limit coverage decreases.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Code Quality generally available July 20, 2026
item.description:
GitHub Code Quality, currently in public preview, will reach general availability on July 20, 2026. The preview has been used by enterprises to detect maintainability and reliability issues, enforce quality gates, and track code coverage.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Code coverage on pull requests is now in public preview
item.description:
Code coverage metrics are now in public preview for GitHub Code Quality users on github.com. Pull requests now show an aggregate code coverage percentage directly in the PR view.

  • Source: GitHub
